title: convert-ocsf-to-mermaid-attack-flow MCP parameters
description: Typed parameters for OCSF Detection Finding to Mermaid attack-flow conversion.

input_path.description: Path to OCSF JSONL input. Omit to read stdin via the input field.

output_path.description: Write Mermaid output to this path instead of stdout.

fenced.description: Wrap output in ```mermaid fences for direct Markdown embedding.
